title: First Aid Retexture
description: A retexture of the mod First Aid by Ichttt
body:
A simple resource pack that changes the textures of the items and HUD from the mod First Aid by Ichttt. This texture pack aims to give the textures a more updated and vanilla friendly feel.

Feel free to use this texture pack however you please as long as I am credited.



**This was made for 1.20.1, but should work for any version.**
